subcodes.first_line: O Thou who art holding fast to the Pure Hem; thou who art the twig of the Blessed Tree! Look thou with seeing eyes at the world about thee, and at the inhabitants thereof. Upon the stage of this immense theatre most spectacular plays are being enacted.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متشبث بذیل اطهر فرع سدره مبارکه در جهان و جهانیان بدیده بینا نظر نما که
subcodes.subjects: @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
